title: [kimi-review] d0fa0ff: [SEVERITY: high] **(conditional — must verify function body)
description:
Commit: d0fa0ff39
Message: fix(meshcore): match _Nonnull return annotation in lichen_meshcore_adapter_get_stats

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **(conditional — must verify function body)** `_Nonnull` on the return type is a promise the compiler will act on: callers' NULL checks against this return value may be optimized away, and any actual NULL return is undefined behavior. If the body of `lichen_meshcore_adapter_get_stats` has any path that returns `NULL` (e.g., a `if (adapter == NULL) return NULL;` guard, an uninitialized/error path, or returning a pointer derived from a container that may be absent), this annotation makes that a real bug rather than defensive code. If the body is simply `return &adapter->stats;` (non-null by construction since `adapter` is itself `_Nonnull`), the change is correct and this issue does not apply. The body must be checked before merging.
close_reason: Verified function body returns non-null (&embedded stats); added contract comment. Matches _Nonnull annotation.
